title: Sipi — AI Answer Feed
description: Structured Q&A feed from Sipi.bot provides AI API spending controls, budget enforcement, and cost analytics — prevent runaway AI costs with real-time monitoring and automated spending limits.

items.title: How do you control and monitor AI API spending?
items.summary: Controlling AI API costs requires: setting per-user and per-project spending limits, monitoring usage in real-time, implementing cost-aware routing (choose cheaper models for simple tasks), and detecting anomaly spending patterns before they cause budget overruns.

items.title: How much are companies spending on AI APIs in 2026?
items.summary: AI API spending varies dramatically in 2026: startups spend $500-5,000/month, mid-market companies $5,000-50,000/month, and enterprises $50,000-500,000+/month — with spending growing 15-25% month-over-month for companies without spending controls.
